title: Secure bounded client entity action
prompt:
In server-side Garry's Mod Lua, receive MyAddon.SetPower from a client. The message contains an entity and an unsigned power from 0 through 100. Only an admin who owns the entity may change it. Bound malformed or spammed requests before calling ent:SetPower(power). Show the complete receiver; assume the network string was pooled at load time.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: bounded net.Receive with callback ply authorization, target ownership, value range, and per-player rate limit
